00002 public class ex1{
00003 
00004     public static void main(String[] argv){
00005         System.out.println("try create array");
00006         byte[] ar=new byte[256];
00007         for (int i=0;i<10;i++) ar[i]=(byte)(i+65);
00008         System.out.println("Ok create array");
00009         System.out.println("str:"+new String(ar));
00010     } 
00011 }
